subtitle: Which soil produces normal yield, high yield, or mutations? All plants at a glance.
result-mutated-desc: Certain soil type → Mutated Plant + 3 Seeds
rotation-mutation-tip:
Mutated plants yield 3 seeds instead of 2 from the Seed Extractor. Ideal for quickly growing your supply.
Note: Mutated plants cannot be processed into oil.
rotation-highyield-tip:
High yield doubles the harvested amount. Optimal for deliveries and resource production.
Combinable with Cozy Level 4 bonus and fertilizer for even more output.
no-results: No plants found for this filter.
footer: Data based on Community Guides & Lightyear Frontier Wiki • As of: 2025
